case_title: SAM A. VONG VS. MUI SY CHE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY VONG, SAM A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHE, MUI SY (REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MING LOC A. VONG) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VONG, SAM A. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY VONG, SAM A. VONG, MING LOC A.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CHE, MUI SY (REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MING LOC A. VONG)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION OF MING LOC VONG FOR GUARDIAN AD LITEM OF DEFENDANT MUI SY CHE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF SAM A. VONG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER CATHRYN HONG #191941. DEFENDANT MUI SY CHE IS PRESENT VIA HER CONSERVATOR MING LUL A VONG, WHO IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER CATHRYN HONG #191941. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VONG, SAM A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHE, MUI SY (REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MING LOC A. VONG) PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE DEFENDANT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR PAYING THE MONEY AT ISSUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY CONSERVATOR FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHE, MUI SY (REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MING LOC A. VONG)
APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM BY MING LOC VONG, DEFENDANT'S CONSERVATOR FILED BY DEFENDANT CHE, MUI SY (REPRESENTED BY GUARDIAN AD LITEM MING LOC A. VONG)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
